settings.text:
Getting the right fit makes all the difference. Our jerseys are official replica cuts — designed to match the same sizing used by the brands on the world stage. Use the measurements below to find your perfect fit before you order.
To measure yourself accurately, use a soft measuring tape. Measure your chest around the fullest part, your waist around your natural waistline, and your hips around the fullest point. If you are between sizes, we recommend going up a size for a more comfortable fit — jerseys are designed with an athletic cut and do not stretch significantly.
All measurements in the table below are in centimeters.

settings.heading: Why Replica?
settings.subheading: Understanding what you're buying — and why it matters.
